title: bupleurum longeradiatum var. leveillei
intro: Bupleurum longeradiatum var. leveillei is a variant of the Bupleurum genus, a type of flowering plant commonly known as Chinese thorny knotweed or Chinese hare's ear, native to China. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Bupleurum longeradiatum var. leveillei include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and improving liver function, as well as its potential in treating viral infections such as hepatitis. Bupleurum longeradiatum var. leveillei can be prepared as a herbal tea or in combination with other herbs to create a decoction or infusion for medicinal purposes.
